description: Comprehensive catalog of all Bharatvarsh reference assets. Each entry describes what the image depicts, its category, art style, and when to use it for prompt engineering / image generation.

seedream_4_5.name: Seedream 4.5
seedream_4_5.when_to_use: Any prompt where a character's face, expression, or costume must match an existing reference image. Use img2img or IP-Adapter with the character's canonical reference sheet. Strongest model for maintaining facial identity across multiple generations.

nano_banana.name: Nano Banana
nano_banana.when_to_use: Any prompt focused on scenery, architecture, technology, or atmospheric backgrounds where no specific character face needs to match a reference. Produces superior painterly and cinematic compositions.

character_references.description: Multi-angle sheets, portraits, expression studies, costume details. Use these as img2img or IP-Adapter inputs with Seedream 4.5 for facial/costume consistency.

files.description: Front-facing stance in formal tactical uniform, dual pulse guns raised. Navy blue suit with cyan/turquoise tech accents. Commanding presence.
files.use_as: Primary front reference for full-body compositions. Attach as IP-Adapter ref for any front-facing Kahaan generation.

files.description: Back view showing gold Ashoka Chakra wheel emblem on navy coat back. Gold embroidery detail on shoulders.
files.use_as: Costume detail reference — ensures faction insignia and back-of-coat design remain consistent.

files.description: Left side profile against black background. Coat drape, shoulder patch detail visible.
files.use_as: Profile angle reference for side-view compositions.

files.description: Right side profile. Gold emblem on sleeve visible. Mirrored symmetry check.
files.use_as: Complementary profile reference.

files.description: 3×3 grid of 9 facial expressions — neutral, focused, determined, angry, surprised, concerned, confident, tactical, introspective. Consistent lighting and framing.
files.use_as: CRITICAL face consistency anchor. Attach as reference for ANY Kahaan portrait. The 9 expressions cover the full emotional range needed for content posts.

files.description: Three-quarter back angle in action pose. Pistol drawn, coat flared, turquoise wrist device (Bracecomm) visible. Futuristic architecture blurred in background.
files.use_as: Action pose reference — shows equipment loadout and dynamic stance.

files.description: Full-body action in futuristic cityscape. Holding tech devices, drone in background. Moody teal/cyan lighting.
files.use_as: Shows Kahaan in operational environment — use for compositions needing character + city context.

files.description: Full-body front stance. Hooded olive-green jacket, tan undershirt, topknot hair, full beard. Tattoo on right bicep. Rustic, weathered warrior aesthetic.
files.use_as: Primary front reference. Contrasts sharply with Kahaan's tech aesthetic — earth vs machine.

files.description: Back view showing Devanagari script on hood and tattoo band on bicep.
files.use_as: Cultural identity markers — Devanagari script and tattoo placement are critical to character.

files.description: Left and right side profiles showing tattoo across both perspectives.
files.use_as: Profile consistency check.

files.description: 2×2 grid of 4 expressions — neutral/serious, communicative, determined/intense, weathered/weary.
files.use_as: Face consistency anchor for all Rudra portraits.

files.description: Three tattoo designs: (1) Trident on chest with mystical energy, (2) 'तत् त्वम् असि' (Tat Tvam Asi) Devanagari on shoulder blade, (3) Armband with trident below right elbow.
files.use_as: CRITICAL spiritual/cultural markers. Must be visible in close-ups and shirtless scenes.

files.description: Curved tactical machete — black blade with serrated edge, ergonomic grip. Labeled 'This is Rudra's Machete'.
files.use_as: Character-specific weapon. Must appear when Rudra is shown armed.

files.description: Close-up of ornamental silver metalwork armband with traditional design.
files.use_as: Jewelry detail for costume accuracy.

files.description: Older statesman in formal dark blue military dress uniform with medals and insignia. Gray hair/mustache. Authoritative bearing in institutional interior.
files.use_as: Primary authority figure reference. Attach for any Pratap generation.

files.description: Rear view showing large gold/bronze circular emblem (crossed weapons/laurel wreath) on back of tunic.
files.use_as: Faction leadership insignia placement.

files.description: Command scene — officer at holographic tactical display showing map of Bharatvarsh. Strategic operations room with monitors.
files.use_as: Pratap in operational context — command room aesthetic.

files.description: Female operative crouched on rooftop, sniper rifle with scope. Dark tactical bodysuit, short dark hair. Nighttime urban environment with city lights.
files.use_as: Primary action reference. Defines Hana's tactical role and silhouette.

files.description: Professional portrait — dark blazer suit, light blue shirt, composed expression. Neutral studio pose.
files.use_as: Civilian/official appearance variant.

files.description: Full-body kneeling on rooftop with sniper rifle, overlooking city nightscape. Holographic HUD elements visible. Title 'Hana: Rooftop Overwatch'.
files.use_as: Operational environment and tactical role definition.

arshi.notes: CLASSIFIED character — limited public-facing use. These references exist for internal pipeline use only. Public content must use silhouette or obscured treatments.

files.description: Young woman in dark teal/black wrapping dress with geometric triangle emblem. Hand raised. Institutional geometric background. Dark hair, athletic build.
files.use_as: Internal reference only — do NOT use for public-facing content unless face is obscured.

files.description: Winter operations outfit — white cloak over dark tactical gear, snow environment, goggles/headgear. Arctic mission variant.
files.use_as: Environmental variant reference. Shows design adaptability across climates.

files.description: Military commander in high-tech tactical bodysuit. Dark gray armor with cyan/turquoise accents. 'GUHYAKAS' nameplate. Indian flag patch. Muscular build.
files.use_as: Defines high-ranking military tech aesthetic. Primary Surya reference.

files.description: Back view showing tactical armor distribution, weapon holster placement. Gray/cyan scheme.
files.use_as: Armor engineering and equipment placement reference.

files.description: Side profile showing armor depth, layering, and 'GUHYAKAS' shoulder patch.
files.use_as: Tech armor consistency from side angle.

files.description: Command center scene — officer at holographic tactical map of Bharatvarsh. Multiple monitors. Strategic operations aesthetic.
files.use_as: Military command environment reference.

faction_symbols.description: Logos, insignias, banners. Must appear consistently on uniforms, backgrounds, and branded content.

assets.description: Golden Ashoka Chakra wheel inside upward-pointing triangle. Two variants: embroidered on uniform and clean schematic.
assets.use_as: Primary faction identifier — must appear on all military uniforms and government imagery.

assets.description: Geometric interlocking triangular shapes forming larger triangle. Minimalist black vector design.
assets.use_as: Akakpen faction identifier — apply to all Akakpen-related content.

assets.description: Snow-capped Himalayan landscape with wind turbines. Carved wooden signpost with Akakpen triangle and 'Eastern Himalayan Treaty Zone / No-Fly Vault' text.
assets.use_as: Akakpen territory and geographic identity. Environmental composition reference.

assets.description: 3D-rendered tribal symbol carved into dark stone. Geometric triangle with weathered relief texture.
assets.use_as: Cultural/sculptural aesthetic of Akakpen faction.

assets.description: Military organizational card showing hierarchical command structure through character portraits in tactical gear.
assets.use_as: Faction hierarchy visualization reference.

technology.description: Weapons, devices, infrastructure. Use with Seedream 4.5 for device detail or Nano Banana for tech-in-environment scenes.

assets.description: Compact energy pistol 'Warringstom 58'. White/silver body, dark blue rail mounts, glowing blue cylindrical core.
assets.use_as: Standard issue weapon. Must appear in hands of operators when armed.

assets.description: Horizontal display of same weapon model. Professional product photography. Model number and markings visible.
assets.use_as: Technical specification reference for detailed close-ups.

assets.description: Compact pulse pistol in ancient temple setting. Labeled 'Compact Pulse-Gun: Palace Carry'. Moody blue archaeological lighting.
assets.use_as: Weapon in narrative context — scale and environmental juxtaposition.

assets.description: Tall cylindrical device with 9-10 horizontal extending fins. Central turquoise glowing core. Atmospheric processing function.
assets.use_as: Worldbuilding infrastructure — must appear in city environment shots along boulevards.

assets.description: Rooftop scene with 4 operators in dark blue coats. Holographic HUD showing squad lattice network. 'Brace-Comm HUD: Squad Lattice' label.
assets.use_as: Communications tech aesthetic and team coordination visuals.

assets.description: Wrist-mounted computing device in isometric view. Dark blue strap, white/gray face, cyan screen. Equipment schematic style.
assets.use_as: Primary Bracecomm device design — must appear on character wrists in close-ups.

assets.description: Missile/dart projectile with aerodynamic fins + Akakpen-marked equipment case with secure compartments.
assets.use_as: Specialized weaponry design reference.

locations.description: Cityscapes, environments, architecture. Use Nano Banana for generating new environment art with these as mood/composition references.

assets.description: Futuristic city wide-angle. Tall vertical architecture with integrated vegetation, geometric grid, flying transport. Teal/cool lighting. Elevated perspective.
assets.use_as: PRIMARY city aesthetic anchor. All Bharatvarsh cityscapes should match this architectural language.

assets.description: Bombed-out urban marketplace — 20-10 bombing aftermath. Hazmat teams in white suits, warning barriers, devastation. Dark industrial aesthetic with orange/red emergency lights.
assets.use_as: 20-10 bombing visual reference. Critical narrative event. Dark, investigative mood.

assets.description: Modern transit hub — elevated subway platform, glass enclosures, green vegetation integration. Daytime urban scene with commuters.
assets.use_as: Civilian normalcy reference. Shows Bharatvarsh daily life before it turns ominous.

assets.description: Night street with modernist glass-fronted structure. Armed uniformed figures. Cool blue nighttime lighting. Surveillance/control aesthetic.
assets.use_as: Mesh surveillance state visual. Use for any 'world_window' content about control systems.

assets.description: Underground command space. Two figures in dark suits facing each other. Dramatic spotlighting, geometric floor, warning tape barriers.
assets.use_as: Interior confrontation scene and antagonist environment.

assets.description: Ornate traditional Indian reception chamber. Multiple figures in formal dress. Carved wooden archways, high ceilings, natural light. Historical/palatial aesthetic.
assets.use_as: Historical institutional setting. Useful for timeline content and lore flashbacks.

style_guides.description: Art direction references that define the overall visual language. Read before starting any generation session.

assets.description: Comprehensive modern comic art style guide based on Jim Lee-influenced superhero aesthetic. Covers: dense hatching/cross-hatching, heavy blacks, exaggerated heroic musculature, dynamic foreshortened poses, aggressive Dutch tilts, action at peak tension, silhouette readability, tactical costume detail, gritty line texture, cinematic camera work.
assets.use_as: MASTER STYLE REFERENCE. Read before every character generation session. Defines the visual language Bharatvarsh art should aspire to — cinematic, detailed, heroic, gritty.

assets.description: Overhead view of classified files — 'BHARATA SENA - INTERNAL SECURITY ARCHIVE' folder with red 'CLASSIFIED // LEVEL - OMEGA' stamps. Black-redacted text. Evidence photography aesthetic.
assets.use_as: Government documentation visual. Perfect for 'the_question' content pillar backgrounds.

cards_and_templates.description: Pre-made card designs showing layout patterns for content posts. Reference for asr-visual-studio template design.

assets.description: Lore index card layout — 'LORE INDEX' header with categorized sections for factions, characters, concepts. Cream/beige card with structured text hierarchy, gold accent borders.
assets.use_as: UI/informational layout reference for lore presentation cards.

assets.description: Book cover design — 'MAHABHARATVARSH' title with glowing blue trident symbol. Dark navy background.
assets.use_as: Publication visual identity and title treatment.

assets.description: Geographic map card showing Bharatvarsh territory with temporal markers (1910, 1932, 1947, 1968, 1975). Historical progression visualized on map.
assets.use_as: Historical timeline visual. Reference for any timeline content or lore reveal posts.

assets.description: Book front cover — character portrait in dark blue military dress tunic. Institutional interior background.
assets.use_as: Publication cover reference. Use when creating 'gateway_cta' posts pointing to book purchase.

assets.description: Book back cover — rear view showing faction insignia on coat back. Institutional space.
assets.use_as: Back cover design reference.

reference_documents.description: PDF documents containing lore and style direction.

assets.description: Complete 9-era historical timeline: 1717 AD (East India Company lost) through 2022 AD (20-10 Bombings). Covers Enlightenment, Divergence, Sindhu-Dakhin Concord, Democratic Republic, Civil War, Year-Turn Decree, Era of the Mesh, and the bombings.
assets.use_as: Lore accuracy reference. Cross-check any timeline content against this before publishing.

assets.description: 11-page comic art style guide. See style_guides category for full details.
assets.use_as: See style_guides entry.

for_character_portraits.notes: Always attach the expression sheet as the primary face anchor. Add front view for costume accuracy.

for_environment_art.notes: Select the mood-matched location reference. Nano Banana excels at atmospheric compositions.

for_technology_closeups.notes: Use Nano Banana for tech-in-environment. Use Seedream for isolated device detail shots.

for_quote_cards.notes: Generate atmospheric backgrounds only — text overlay handled by templates.
